title: The Aldo Faisal Optimization Framework
description: A flowchart illustrating the core components and iterative process of Aldo Faisal's optimization technique for complex systems or biological data analysis.
elements: Algorithm Selection (e.g., Gradient Descent, Bayesian Optimization)
relationships: Sequential and iterative flow connecting all elements, with feedback loops from 'Solution Evaluation' back to 'Problem Formulation', 'Model Construction', and 'Algorithm Selection' for refinement.
